seoTitle: Alexandria City Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Key Dates & PDF
seoDescription: ACPS 2025-2026 traditional calendar with Aug 18 first day, Jun 12 last day, holidays, breaks, early dismissals, official PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: ACPS starts the 2025-2026 traditional school year on August 18, 2025 and ends on June 12, 2026. Preschool at the ACPS Early Childhood Center and VPI classes starts on August 20. Thanksgiving/Fall Break runs November 26-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 30-April 3. The calendar was approved December 14, 2023 and later amended, most recently March 26, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Alexandria City Public Schools start in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Alexandria City Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 traditional school year on Monday, August 18, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When do ACPS preschool and VPI classes start in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The ACPS calendar lists Wednesday, August 20, 2025 as the first day for Preschool at the ACPS Early Childhood Center and Virginia Preschool Initiative classes.

calendarFaqs.q: When is ACPS Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the ACPS 2025-2026 traditional calendar runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for ACPS in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for Alexandria City Public Schools students is Friday, June 12, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: K-12 students start on August 18, 2025; preschool and VPI classes start on August 20.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: ACPS schedules a five-weekday spring break at the end of March and start of April.

yearNumbers.label: June Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists high school final exam early dismissals June 9-12 and all-student afternoon teacher-workday early dismissals June 11-12.
